scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "green,cyan" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "green,cyan" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
